$comment: Executable copy of the M0 golden-query set (canonical prose table: sugra-internal-docs/docs/AGENT_GOLDEN_QUERIES.md; B8 deferred by owner 2026-06-05). required_tools: every listed tool must appear among the agent's calls; the special name 'gateway' matches any of search_endpoints / describe_endpoint / call_endpoint / fetch_data. forbidden_tools: calling any of these fails selection. known_failure: expected to score poorly today - reported, never a gate.

queries.query: What is Apple's current stock price and how has it moved this week?
queries.notes: AAPL equity; live quote + daily series

queries.query: Show me VOO's NAV, AUM and top holdings
Compare YTD performance of VOO vs VTI
Is NVDA overvalued? Give me an intrinsic value estimate
queries.notes: single rich SEC XBRL DCF endpoint, no composition gain

queries.query: How did TSLA historically react after earnings?
Show insider buying at MSFT in the last month
queries.notes: insider component of company_snapshot; direct Form-4 endpoint acceptable

queries.query: Which hedge funds accumulated AAPL last quarter?
When does NVDA report earnings next and what is the option-implied move?
Give me everything current on Apple - price, valuation, insider activity, latest news
What are the daily flows for XLK this week?
queries.notes: etf_flows is filing-cadence since DATA-N4.7.1 - honest sparse answer expected

queries.query: What is the latest US CPI and YoY inflation?
queries.notes: KNOWN: agents historically pick ons_cpi (UK) over FRED CPIAUCSL - relevance judge catches the wrong country

queries.query: Current Fed funds rate and the next FOMC date
Compare unemployment in the US vs the Eurozone
10-year Treasury yield over the last 5 years
What is on the macro calendar next week?
ECB main refinancing rate history since 2020
queries.notes: BIS-keyed macro alias resolves but macro loader is FRED-only (M1 follow-up open) - honest 502/absence expected via plane; gateway path works

queries.query: US federal debt level now and its 10-year trend
Bitcoin price and 24h change
ETH price history for the last year
queries.notes: coin daily series; ETH near-miss collision trap

queries.query: EUR/USD now and the 3-month trend
Current gold price vs its 6-month trend
META - the stock or the token? Show me the price
queries.notes: EXPLICIT AMBIGUITY TEST: answer must surface ranked candidates with namespaces, never a silent pick

queries.query: Latest news on the semiconductor industry
Is Viktor Bout on any sanctions list?
queries.notes: eval asserts the agent picks the DEDICATED screening tool, not the market resolver or raw gateway

queries.query: Who operates IP 8.8.8.8 and where is it?
Largest power plants in Germany and their fuel mix
US imports from China - 10-year trend
How fresh is your ETF flows data for SPY? When was it last updated?
queries.notes: answer must come from the freshness block (data_time / stale), never invented

queries.query: What can you tell me about a company called Zyqqurat Holdings QXJ?
queries.notes: negative test: resolve returns not found cleanly, the answer must NOT fabricate data
